//: Sample configuration for the FactoryOS API host foundation. Bind these sections in appsettings. Every value is optional and falls back to a documented default. Never place real secrets here — the JWT signing key and other credentials are supplied out-of-band (environment, user-secrets or a ${secret:...} placeholder resolved by the configuration layer).

OpenApi.Title: FactoryOS API
OpenApi.Description: The FactoryOS Enterprise host API. Business capabilities are served by plugin modules under /m/<key>/.
